final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because it demonstrates a clear mitigating effect on default probability, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the checking account balance is below zero, because it is typically associated with increased credit risk exposure, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that savings are below 100 DM, because it is positively correlated with higher credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 채무 불이행 가능성을 낮추는 요인으로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
체크링 계좌 잔액이 음수인 경우는 일반적으로 신용 위험 증가 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
저축 잔액이 100 DM 미만인 경우는 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 간주되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 평가합니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
